text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in the middle of planning out a training
regimen, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ouch, my head... It feels like it's about to stretch
apart like New Year's mochi...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I guess this means my protective charms
aren't working anymore.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have a charm dedicated to soothing headache
pain, and one that helps medicine work a hundred
times better...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's why! I'm not wearing my
headache-removal cha—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's headache seems to be
pretty bad.
